2295860.name: My Singing Monsters - Season of Love Skin Pack
2295860.description:
Unlock the Season of Love Island Skin available on Air Island. Alongside the cosmetic makeover to Air Island, you'll receive the following permanent boosts to Air Island upon purchasing.
  • 10% speed up to Breeding
  • 10% speed up to Baking

Once an Island Skin has been bought, its Boosts are automatically added to that Island. The Skin does not need to be activated to use the Boosts.

Note: You will need to exit and reopen your game for the Island Skin to appear in your inventory.
2295860.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
